SignatureSnippet.title: How to verify webhook signatures
SignatureSnippet.signatureFormatBody: Every webhook request includes the header:
SignatureSnippet.signatureFormatDetail: The v0 value is an HMAC-SHA256 computed over <timestamp>.<rawBody> using your endpoint's signing secret as the key. To prevent downgrade attacks, ignore all schemes other than v0.
SignatureSnippet.replayProtectionBody: reject events where the timestamp is older than 5 minutes.
